title: How to Reserve a Spot for an Event
content:
If a user asks how to reserve an event:

- Guide them to the CultPass app
- Instruct them to browse the experience catalog and tap 'Reserve'
- If it's a premium or limited event, check if reservation confirmation is required via email
- Remind them to arrive at least 15 minutes early with their QR code visible

**Suggested phrasing:**
"You can reserve an experience by opening the CultPass app, selecting your desired event, and tapping 'Reserve'. Be sure to arrive 15 minutes early with your QR code ready."

title: What's Included in a CultPass Subscription
content:
Each user is entitled to 4 cultural experiences per month, which may include:
- Art exhibitions
- Museum entries
- Music concerts
- Film screenings and more

Some premium experiences may require an additional fee (visible in the app).

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Your CultPass subscription includes 4 curated experiences each month. You can choose from museums, concerts, film events and more. Premium events may have an extra cost, which is shown during reservation."

title: How to Cancel or Pause a Subscription
content:
Users can manage their subscription via the app > 'My Account' > 'Manage Plan'.

- Cancel: Effective at the end of the billing cycle
- Pause: Preserves user data, resumes automatically when reactivated
- Do NOT offer refunds unless approved by support lead

**Suggested phrasing:**
"You can cancel or pause your subscription at any time via the 'My Account' section in the CultPass app. Cancelation takes effect at the end of your billing cycle."

title: How to Handle Login Issues?
content:
Most login issues are resolved with password reset:

- Ask the user to tap 'Forgot Password' on the login screen
- Ensure they are using the correct registered email
- If they did not receive the reset email, check spam folder or retry after 10 minutes
- For persistent login issues, escalate to human support

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Try tapping 'Forgot Password' on the login screen. Make sure you're using the email associated with your account. If the email doesn't arrive, check spam or try again in a few minutes."

title: Understanding Membership Tiers
content:
CultPass offers different membership tiers designed for various usage needs.

- Basic tiers include standard experiences
- Premium tiers unlock exclusive and high-demand events
- Tier limits and perks are always visible before booking

**Suggested phrasing:**
"You can view and compare CultPass membership tiers directly in the app to choose the plan that best fits your needs."

title: What to Do If an Event Is Fully Booked
content:
If an event shows no available slots:

- Encourage users to check back later for cancellations
- Suggest similar experiences in the same category
- Notify them that premium users get early access when available

**Suggested phrasing:**
"If an event is fully booked, you can try checking again later or explore similar experiences available in the app."

title: How to Check Your Monthly Quota
content:
Users can view remaining experience credits by:

- Opening the CultPass app
- Navigating to 'My Account'
- Reviewing monthly quota and usage history

**Suggested phrasing:**
"You can check your remaining monthly experience quota anytime from the 'My Account' section in the CultPass app."

title: Late Arrival Policy for Events
content:
Late arrivals may result in denied entry:

- Users should arrive at least 15 minutes early
- Entry is not guaranteed after the event starts
- No refunds are offered for late arrivals

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Please try to arrive at least 15 minutes early, as late arrival may result in denied entry without a refund."

title: How QR Code Entry Works
content:
Entry to CultPass experiences requires a valid QR code:

- QR codes are generated upon reservation
- Available in the app under 'My Bookings'
- Must be shown at venue entry

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Your QR code will be available in the app after booking and must be shown at the venue for entry."

title: Changing a Reserved Experience
content:
If users need to change a reservation:

- Cancellations must be done before the cutoff time
- Users may rebook another experience if quota allows
- Late cancellations may result in quota loss

**Suggested phrasing:**
"You can cancel and rebook experiences before the cutoff time, provided you have remaining quota."

title: What Happens If an Event Is Canceled
content:
If CultPass cancels an event:

- Users are notified via email and app
- Quota is automatically restored
- Alternative experiences may be suggested

**Suggested phrasing:**
"If an event is canceled, your quota will be restored automatically and you'll be notified right away."

title: How to Update Your Account Information
content:
Users can update personal details by:

- Going to the CultPass app
- Selecting 'My Account'
- Editing profile and saving changes

**Suggested phrasing:**
"You can update your personal information anytime from the 'My Account' section in the app."

title: Premium Event Access Explained
content:
Premium events are exclusive or limited-capacity experiences:

- Available to premium members first
- May include additional guest access rules
- Clearly labeled in the app

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Premium events are marked in the app and may offer early or exclusive access for premium members."

title: How Notifications Work in CultPass
content:
CultPass sends notifications for:

- Reservation confirmations
- Event reminders
- Cancellations or changes

Users can manage notification preferences in app settings.

**Suggested phrasing:**
"You'll receive notifications for bookings and reminders, which you can customize in the app settings."
